Name: DuoSecurityCCF
Author: Cisco Duo - set-your-email@example.com
Description:
The **Cisco Duo Security (CCF)** solution ingests authentication, activity, and telephony logs from the [Duo Admin API v2](https://duo.com/docs/adminapi) into Microsoft Sentinel using the Codeless Connector Framework, as a forward-compatible replacement for the legacy Azure Function connector that uses the retiring HTTP Data Collector API. Because the Duo Admin API requires per-request HMAC-SHA1 signing (which CCF cannot perform natively), the connector polls a lightweight signing proxy (an Azure Function deployed from this solution's `signing-proxy/`) that signs each request and forwards it to Duo. A backward-compatible `CiscoDuo` parser normalizes both the new `DuoSecurity*_CL` tables and the legacy `CiscoDuo_CL` table, so existing analytic rules, hunting queries, and workbooks continue to work and both connectors can run side by side during migration.

**Underlying Microsoft Technologies used:**

This solution depends on the [Codeless Connector Framework (CCF)](https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/azure/sentinel/create-codeless-connector) and DCR-based ingestion-time transformations, which may be in Preview and may incur additional ingestion or operational costs.
